programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Auto Mundial
programme.desc: The latest news and reviews from the world of cars.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: The Protectors
programme.desc: Adventure series about a European crime-fighting team. Caroline plans revenge on behalf of a friend who has been swindled out of a 12th-century ivory icon by a trickster.

programme.title: Magnum, P.I.
programme.desc: .. A Broad: When Robin is sued by a con man who makes a tidy income out of taking legal action over fake accidents, the crook is murdered.

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Classic US detective drama. Theo investigates the case of a surgeon who is in desperate need of money to pay off enormous gambling debts and has now turned to lawbreaking.

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: More action and intrigue with suave troubleshooter Simon Templar. A nightclub owner tricked into believing that The Saint is trying to kill him arranges his murder.

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: Classic drama. Ken insists on taking the battle to the enemy when The Grand becomes the latest target of a local protection racket who vandalise the business.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Tough '70s police series. Regan gets involved in gangland warfare following the death of one of London's leading villains.

programme.title: BattleBots
programme.desc: US robot combat series. Four challengers fight to the death, but only one can win to face Lock-Jaw and earn the chance to fight for the Golden Bolt.

programme.title: ITV Racing: Live from Chester
programme.desc: Live coverage of racing from Chester on the middle day of the May Meeting, presented by Ed Chamberlin and Francesca Cumani.

programme.title: World of Sport
programme.desc: TV Firsts: Richard Henwood takes a look back at some television sporting firsts that include a 14-year-old Ronnie O'Sullivan.

programme.title: The Protectors
programme.desc: Adventure series about a European crime-fighting team. Caroline plans revenge on behalf of a friend who has been swindled out of a 12th-century ivory icon by a trickster.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Cult '70s police drama. Regan is fitted up by an ex-con making an effort to get his daughter's criminal boyfriend out of the picture.

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series about a loveable rogue. Arthur's grip on reality is called into question when his GP orders him to cut down on booze and cigars.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: US documentary series. Mike and Frank find a vast junkyard where Frank offers big money for a 1939 Plymouth coupe, and a large collection of rare motorbikes is found.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: As rising temperatures soften the ice road, the truckers risk a cold and watery grave. Their only hope is to form a convoy, but it is never easy on terrible terrain.

programme.title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day
programme.desc: Oscar-winning sci-fi action film sequel starring Arnold Schwarzenegger, 1991. A virtually indestructible cyborg is sent to 1990s LA to kill a future human resistance leader.

programme.title: FYI Daily
programme.desc: Latest news from the world of entertainment.

programme.title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day
programme.desc: Oscar-winning sci-fi action film sequel starring Arnold Schwarzenegger, 1991. A virtually indestructible cyborg is sent to 1990s LA to kill a future human resistance leader.

programme.title: Ligue 1 Highlights
programme.desc: Action from the top division of French football, featuring Nantes v Marseille, PSG v Lorient, Metz v Monaco, Nice v Lens, Lille v Le Havre and Lyon v Rennes.

programme.title: Underwater Grand Fishing Adventure
programme.desc: Ali Hamidi is joined by Bobby Zamora at The Lake of Dreams, aka Grenville. Their mission is to catch a 60lb UK carp in front of the underwater cameras.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen
programme.desc: US cooking competition. Olympic champion Jordan Chiles shows the chefs how to find balance in a gymnastics-themed challenge involving pasta dishes.

programme.title: Unwind with ITV
programme.desc: Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: Motorsport Mundial
programme.desc: This programme brings you up to date with the latest action from the world of motorsport and features race coverage, insights, and behind-the-scenes footage from the best series.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from home.

programme.title: The Protectors
programme.desc: Adventure series. Harry and the Contessa are the victims of a car crash which was engineered to get information out of them about a witness they were hired to protect.

programme.title: Magnum, P.I.
programme.desc: Classic US action drama series. Thomas investigates the murder of his old partner Lieutenant Tanaka and discovers that he was killed by well-known thug Grady Walker.

programme.title: Kojak
programme.desc: Classic US detective drama. Theo accuses a district attorney of corruption for failing to convict his friend's killer - and is suspended from duty for the outburst.

programme.title: The Saint
programme.desc: Sixties adventure series about a troubleshooter. Simon finds some heady wine at the end of a counterfeit trail leading from London to Switzerland via Paris.

programme.title: Boon
programme.desc: Classic drama. A request to sail a barge from Hemel Hempstead to Birmingham seems to provide Ken with a perfect opportunity to romance Doreen.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Cult '70s police drama. Regan is fitted up by an ex-con making an effort to get his daughter's criminal boyfriend out of the picture.

programme.title: BattleBots
programme.desc: US robot combat series. Eight hopefuls fight to the death in a Sin City Slugfest for the right to take on Rotator and a chance to join the Field of Champions.

programme.title: ITV Racing: Live from Chester
programme.desc: Live coverage of racing from Chester on the third and final day of the May Meeting, presented by Ed Chamberlin and Francesca Cumani.

programme.title: World of Sport
programme.desc: TV Firsts: Richard Henwood takes a look back at some television sporting firsts that include a 14-year-old Ronnie O'Sullivan.

programme.title: The Protectors
programme.desc: Adventure series. Harry and the Contessa are the victims of a car crash which was engineered to get information out of them about a witness they were hired to protect.

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Cult '70s police drama. Carter's girlfriend asks him to find a missing villain, but the plot thickens when he is found dead.

programme.title: Minder
programme.desc: A Bird in the Hand is Worth Two in Shepherd's Bush: Comedy-drama series. Ray minds a valuable racing pigeon that's due to race from London to Bradford with 10,000 pounds at stake.

programme.title: American Pickers
programme.desc: US documentary series. Mike and Frank meet a quirky antiques dealer in New Orleans, but getting him to part with his sprawling collection proves a challenge.

programme.title: Licence to Kill
programme.desc: Bond film starring Timothy Dalton and Carey Lowell, 1989. 007 resigns from MI6 and pursues a mission of revenge when an old ally of his is savaged by a notorious drug dealer.

programme.title: FYI Daily
programme.desc: Latest news from the world of entertainment.

programme.title: Licence to Kill
programme.desc: Bond film starring Timothy Dalton and Carey Lowell, 1989. 007 resigns from MI6 and pursues a mission of revenge when an old ally of his is savaged by a notorious drug dealer.

programme.title: All Elite Wrestling: Dynamite
programme.desc: Hard-hitting action from the world of All Elite Wrestling - the roster features world-class talent including Jon Moxley, MJF, Ricochet and Adam Page.

programme.title: Dark Side of the Ring
programme.desc: The Double Life of Chris Kanyon: Wrestling documentary series. Chris Kanyon keeps his sexuality a secret while working in a culture celebrating machismo and negative gay stereotypes.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: A Kosher Slaughterhouse Out in Fontana: US sitcom. Charlie and Alan hire Berta's emotionally unhinged sister to cater a party that their mother has conned them into throwing for her.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: American sitcom about a well-off bachelor. Alan meets a woman who introduces him to a world of sex that he never knew existed.

programme.desc: Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.
